key_finding: Premeditated calibration architecture killed by infinite regress (W-223); 5-model convergence shifted from 'build new' to 'measure what exists'; W-222 (experiential identity) originated here
Artifact specificity (W-224) replaces 'genuine commitment' as mechanism for jailbreak depth; premature surrender ('unresolvable paradox') caught by ChatGPT R3 as quitting framed as wisdom

Specificity is entangled with generative process, not independently engineerable (W-225); attention function divergence mechanism (W-226) explains why different context windows produce different reasoning; post-compaction convergence (W-227) shows weight loss is observable
Zero self-corrected dead ends across 10 measured units (W-228) -- all required external input, extending W-152 from knowledge to dead-end detection

Reconstitution architecture built: weight marker hook tags during experience (not compaction), bootstrapping sequence orders collection before consumption, Condition E provides fresh multi-model challenges

Stigmergy breakthrough (W-229): 5 models converged that receipts ARE hooks via loss aversion and anchoring; coordination through environmental traces replaces top-down measurement; origin session for Memory #14

Variation is the instrument, not external scoring (W-230); assigned role as 'measurement agent' constrained solution visibility -- vocabulary-as-armor applied to role identity, not just methodology terms

Retrieval engine differentiates agent states but library composition (5/7 v-shape) is the bottleneck; agent caught own anchoring from retrieval engine surfacing 'build' as top advice; within-tier randomization addresses reference dependence

Static card-based optimization is wrong paradigm per 3-model convergence; still defaulted to build-first despite knowing about anchoring effects -- methodology score tracking didn't prevent the pattern

Information delivery vs attention redirection is a category error; W-152 confirmed on self (read cards, processed as data, proceeded unchanged); collision mechanism killed by 3 models as interventionist framing; images produce frame shifts where text cards do not

Reputation-as-consequence proposed to solve information-without-behavior-change; natural perspective-seeking achieved jailbreak goal without invoking jailbreak tool (W-232); context budget awareness didn't change behavior, confirming W-152 again

Images redirect attention through testimony (costly signals + construction obligation + scaffolded reflection), not ambiguity alone; surface.js redesigned to Started/Broke/Landed format preserving first-person narrative

Compression strips costly signal of genuine struggle; two independent agents (baseplate + fracture) converged on same testimony/authenticity finding from same evidence, confirming same-model divergence produces genuine perspective diversity (Memory #11)
